creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: hrs
Date: Sat Feb  2 18:12:15 2013
New Revision: 311438
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311438

Log:
  - Add LICENSE.
  - Style fix.
  
  Submitted by:	Yasuhiro KIMURA
  PR:		ports/175286

Modified:
  head/editors/tamago/Makefile

Modified: head/editors/tamago/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/editors/tamago/Makefile	Sat Feb  2 18:02:21 2013	(r311437)
+++ head/editors/tamago/Makefile	Sat Feb  2 18:12:15 2013	(r311438)
@@ -1,13 +1,9 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	tamago
-# Date created:		6 March 2000
-# Whom:			tetsushi NAKAI <nakai@tsl.pe.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
-#
+# Created by: tetsushi NAKAI <nakai@tsl.pe.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	tamago
 PORTVERSION=	4.0.6.0.20041122.19
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	editors elisp
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_DEBIAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pool/main/e/egg
@@ -22,6 +18,8 @@ PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
 MAINTAINER=	hrs@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	The Multilingual Input Method - Egg V4
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_EMACS=	yes
@@ -56,7 +54,7 @@ post-build:
 
 post-install:
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/helper/egg-helper ${PREFIX}/bin/egg-helper
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
